---
name: ⚠️ Breaking Change
about: Report a breaking change or incompatibility in an update
title: '[Breaking] <short description>'
labels: breaking-change
assignees: 'deinfreu'
---

## What Changed
Describe the behavior that changed and which version introduced it.

## Affected Components
Which parts are impacted (e.g., config files, volume mounts, environment variables, Docker Compose).

## Migration Path
How should users adapt? Include any steps or workarounds needed to upgrade safely.

## Environment
- Previous working version: 
- Broken version: 
- OS / Docker setup: 

## Additional Context
Logs, error messages, or PRs that introduced the change.
